mapper.sql: /* wms-outbound-pkcnfrm-sql-oracle.xml - selectPkIstedDtlSql - 피킹확정 - 피킹지시 상세 조회 SQL */ SELECT 0 AS CHK /*체크박스*/ , PIDT.CTKEY /*센터코드*/ , PIDT.OWKEY /*화주코드*/ , PIDT.OBHDKEY /*릴리즈코드(출고공통코드)*/ , PIDT.OBDTKEY /*릴리즈상세코드(출고상세코드)*/ , PIDT.PIHDKEY /*피킹헤더코드*/ , PIDT.PIDTKEY /*피킹상세코드*/ , PIDT.PKDTWKSTATUSCD /*피킹상세작업코드*/ , OBDT.OBDTSTATUSCD /*출고상세작업상태코드*/ , ASRT.ASRTMASICKEY /*아소트 모상품 코드*/ , ASRTIC.ICNM AS ASRTMASICNM /*아소트 모상품 명*/ , IC.ASRTYN /*아소트여부*/ , PIDT.ICKEY /*상품코드*/ , IC.ICNM /*상품명*/ , AR.ARNM /*구역명*/ , PIDT.LCKEY /*로케이션코드*/ , PIDT.FROMLCKEY /*FROM 로케이션코드*/ , PIDT.TOLCKEY /*TO 로케이션코드*/ , PIDT.IVATKEY /*재고속성코드*/ , PIDT.UOM /*상품단위유형*/ , PIDT.EXPCTQTY /*예정수량*/ , PIDT.CNFRMQTY /*완료수량*/ , (PIDT.EXPCTQTY - PIDT.CNFRMQTY) AS TOCNFRMQTY /*잔여수량*/ , PIDT.PKCNFRMURKEY /*피킹확정자*/ , PIDT.PKCNFRMDATE /*피킹확정일시*/ FROM TWORK_INFO_OB_HD OBHD /*출고공통정보*/ INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_DT OBDT /*출고상세정보*/ ON OBHD.CTKEY = OBDT.CTKEY AND OBHD.OWKEY = OBDT.OWKEY AND OBHD.OBHDKEY = OBDT.OBHDKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_PI_HD PIHD /*피킹헤더정보*/ ON OBHD.CTKEY = PIHD.CTKEY AND OBHD.OWKEY = PIHD.OWKEY AND OBHD.PIHDKEY = PIHD.PIHDKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_PI_DT PIDT /*피킹상세정보*/ ON PIHD.CTKEY = PIDT.CTKEY AND PIHD.OWKEY = PIDT.OWKEY AND PIHD.PIHDKEY = PIDT.PIHDKEY AND OBDT.OBHDKEY = PIDT.OBHDKEY AND OBDT.OBDTKEY = PIDT.OBDTKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_IC IC /*상품마스터*/ ON PIDT.CTKEY = IC.CTKEY AND PIDT.OWKEY = IC.OWKEY AND PIDT.ICKEY = IC.ICKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_MST_ASRT ASRT /*아소트정보*/ ON IC.CTKEY = ASRT.CTKEY AND IC.OWKEY = ASRT.OWKEY AND IC.ICKEY = ASRT.ASRTDTICKEY AND IC.ASRTYN = 'Y' LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_MST_IC ASRTIC /*상품마스터(아소트)*/ ON ASRT.CTKEY = ASRTIC.CTKEY AND ASRT.OWKEY = ASRTIC.OWKEY AND ASRT.ASRTMASICKEY = ASRTIC.ICKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_INFO_WA_DT WADT /*웨이브상세*/ ON OBHD.CTKEY = WADT.CTKEY AND OBHD.OWKEY = WADT.OWKEY AND OBHD.OBHDKEY = WADT.OBHDKEY AND OBHD.WAHDKEY = WADT.WAHDKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_MST_LC LC /*로케이션마스터*/ ON PIDT.CTKEY = LC.CTKEY AND PIDT.LCKEY = LC.LCKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_MST_AR AR /*구역마스터*/ ON LC.CTKEY = AR.CTKEY AND LC.ARKEY = AR.ARKEY WHERE OBDT.OBDTSTATUSCD IN ('20','25','30') /*20:피킹지시,25:부분피킹,30:피킹확정 */ AND PIHD.PKDIVCD = '10' /*피킹구분코드 10:오더별피킹*/ AND PIHD.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND PIHD.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND PIHD.PIHDKEY = #{pihdkey} AND WADT.WAHDKEY IS NULL ORDER BY PIDT.OBDTKEY
mapper.select: /* wms-outbound-pkcnfrm-sql-oracle.xml - pkToCnfrmDtListSelect - 피킹확정 - 피킹헤더번호에 해당하는 확정처리대상 피킹상세 조회 */ SELECT OBHD.CTKEY /*센터코드*/ , OBHD.OWKEY /*화주코드*/ , OBHD.OBHDKEY /*릴리즈코드(출고공통코드)*/ , PIDT.OBDTKEY /*릴리즈상세코드(출고상세코드)*/ , PIDT.PIHDKEY /*피킹헤더코드*/ , PIDT.PIDTKEY /*피킹상세코드*/ , PIDT.PKDTWKSTATUSCD /*피킹상세 작업상태 코드*/ , PIDT.EXPCTQTY /*예정수량*/ , (PIDT.EXPCTQTY - PIDT.CNFRMQTY) AS CNFRMQTY /*잔여수량*/ , PIDT.IVATKEY /*재고속성코드*/ , PIDT.ICKEY /*상품코드*/ , PIDT.FROMLCKEY /*FROM 로케이션코드*/ , PIDT.TOLCKEY /*TO 로케이션코드*/ FROM TWORK_INFO_OB_HD OBHD /*출고공통정보*/ INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_OB_DT OBDT /*출고상세정보*/ ON OBHD.CTKEY = OBDT.CTKEY AND OBHD.OWKEY = OBDT.OWKEY AND OBHD.OBHDKEY = OBDT.OBHDKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_PI_DT PIDT/*피킹상세정보*/ ON OBDT.CTKEY = PIDT.CTKEY AND OBDT.OWKEY = PIDT.OWKEY AND OBDT.OBHDKEY = PIDT.OBHDKEY AND OBDT.OBDTKEY = PIDT.OBDTKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_INFO_WA_DT WADT /*웨이브상세*/ ON OBHD.CTKEY = WADT.CTKEY AND OBHD.OWKEY = WADT.OWKEY AND OBHD.OBHDKEY = WADT.OBHDKEY WHERE OBHD.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OBHD.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND OBHD.OBHDKEY = #{obhdkey} AND OBDT.OBDTSTATUSCD IN ('20','25') /*20:피킹지시 25:부분피킹*/ AND PIDT.PIHDKEY = #{pihdkey} AND PIDT.PKDTWKSTATUSCD = '00' /*00:작업대상*/ AND WADT.WAHDKEY IS NULL

/* wms-outbound-pkcnfrm-sql-oracle.xml - selectPkIstCnlMap - WMS > 출고 관리 > 피킹확정 > 피킹지시 취소 - 릴리즈코드의 출고헤더상태 조회 */ SELECT OH.CTKEY , OH.OWKEY , OH.PIHDKEY , SUM(CASE WHEN OH.OBSTATUSCD <> '20' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) OB_CNT , SUM(CASE WHEN PD.PKDTWKSTATUSCD = '10' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS PK_CNT FROM TWORK_INFO_OB_HD OH INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_PI_DT PD ON OH.CTKEY = PD.CTKEY AND OH.OWKEY = PD.OWKEY AND OH.OBHDKEY = PD.OBHDKEY
INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_WA_HD WH ON OH.CTKEY = WH.CTKEY AND OH.OWKEY = WH.OWKEY AND OH.WAHDKEY = WH.WAHDKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_WA_DT WD ON OH.CTKEY = WD.CTKEY AND OH.OWKEY = WD.OWKEY AND OH.WAHDKEY = WD.WAHDKEY AND OH.OBHDKEY = WD.OBHDKEY AND WD.DELYN = 'N'
WHERE OH.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OH.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND OH.PIHDKEY = #{pihdkey} AND OH.OBSTATUSCD ='20'
AND WH.WAWKSTATUSCD = '40'
GROUP BY OH.CTKEY , OH.OWKEY , OH.PIHDKEY

/* wms-outbound-pkcnfrm-sql-oracle.xml - selectPkIstCnlWaHdKey - WMS > 출고 관리 > 피킹확정 > 피킹지시 취소 - 피킹 헤더코드 조회 */ SELECT OH.CTKEY , OH.OWKEY , OH.WAHDKEY , OH.PIHDKEY FROM TWORK_INFO_OB_HD OH INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_WA_HD WH ON OH.CTKEY = WH.CTKEY AND OH.OWKEY = WH.OWKEY AND OH.WAHDKEY = WH.WAHDKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_WA_DT WD ON OH.CTKEY = WD.CTKEY AND OH.OWKEY = WD.OWKEY AND OH.WAHDKEY = WD.WAHDKEY AND OH.OBHDKEY = WD.OBHDKEY AND WD.DELYN = 'N' WHERE OH.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OH.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND OH.PIHDKEY = #{pihdkey} AND OH.OBSTATUSCD ='20' AND WH.WAWKSTATUSCD = '40' GROUP BY OH.CTKEY , OH.OWKEY , OH.WAHDKEY , OH.PIHDKEY

/* wms-outbound-pkcnfrm-sql-oracle.xml - selectPkIstCnlList - WMS > 출고 관리 > 피킹확정 > 피킹지시 취소 - 피킹 지시 취소 릴리즈 조회 */ SELECT OH.CTKEY , OH.OWKEY , OH.OBHDKEY , OH.PIHDKEY FROM TWORK_INFO_OB_HD OH WHERE OH.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OH.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND OH.PIHDKEY = #{pihdkey} AND OH.OBSTATUSCD ='20' GROUP BY OH.CTKEY , OH.OWKEY , OH.OBHDKEY , OH.PIHDKEY

/* wms-outbound-pkcnfrm-sql-oracle.xml - pkToCnlCnfrmDtListSelect - 피킹확정 - 피킹헤더번호에 해당하는 확정취소 처리대상 피킹상세 조회 */ SELECT PIDT.CTKEY /*센터코드*/ , PIDT.OWKEY /*화주코드*/ , PIDT.OBHDKEY /*릴리즈코드(출고공통코드)*/ , PIDT.OBDTKEY /*릴리즈상세코드(출고상세코드)*/ , PIDT.PIHDKEY /*피킹헤더코드*/ , PIDT.PIDTKEY /*피킹상세코드*/ , PIDT.PKDTWKSTATUSCD /*피킹상세 작업상태 코드*/ , PIDT.EXPCTQTY /*예정수량*/ , PIDT.CNFRMQTY /*취소할 확정수량*/ , PIDT.IVATKEY /*재고속성코드*/ , PIDT.ICKEY /*상품코드*/ , PIDT.LCKEY /*로케이션코드*/ , PIDT.FROMLCKEY /*FROM 로케이션코드*/ , PIDT.TOLCKEY /*TO 로케이션코드*/ FROM TWORK_INFO_OB_HD OBHD /*출고공통정보*/ INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_PI_DT PIDT /*피킹상세정보*/ ON OBHD.CTKEY = PIDT.CTKEY AND OBHD.OWKEY = PIDT.OWKEY AND OBHD.OBHDKEY = PIDT.OBHDKEY LEFT OUTER JOIN TWORK_INFO_WA_DT WADT /*웨이브상세*/ ON OBHD.CTKEY = WADT.CTKEY AND OBHD.OWKEY = WADT.OWKEY AND OBHD.OBHDKEY = WADT.OBHDKEY WHERE OBHD.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND OBHD.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND OBHD.OBSTATUSCD < '35' /*35:부분출고*/ AND PIDT.PKDTWKSTATUSCD = '10' /*10:피킹확정*/ AND PIDT.PIHDKEY = #{pihdkey} AND WADT.WAHDKEY IS NULL ORDER BY PIDT.IVATKEY, PIDT.LCKEY
